title: 4500mAh 21.6V Replacement Battery968670-06,225403,229687 Compatible with SV11 V7 Animal/Motorhead/Absolute/Trigger/HEPA/Car+Boat Handheld Vacuum Cleaners
features: Precise Compatibility: Compatible with Dyson V7 series models: SV11, Motorhead Pro, Animal, Trigger, Car+Boat, Fluffy (Part#968670-06,229687,225403).Not compatible with V6/V8/V10/V11.
High-Capacity Power: 21.6V voltage and 4500mAh capacity deliver extended runtime for uninterrupted cleaning sessions.Maintains peak performance for your cordless vacuum cleaners.
Fresh & Reliable: 100% brand-new battery with optimized cells.Ensures stable power output and consistent performance from first use.
Easy Installation: Simply swap out your old battery with this new one—no tools or technical skills required.It’s a quick and hassle-free process.
Expert Support: Confirm your model before purchase.Contact us anytime for compatibility guidance; our technical team provides prompt solutions post-purchase.
description: Voltage: 21.6V Battery Capacity: 4500mAh Condition: 100% Brand New Packaging: 1PC Battery Compatible Models: Compatible With All V7 Series Cordless Vacuum Cleaner： V7 Motorhead Pro, V7 Motorhead vacuum, V7 Total Clean, V7 Trigger, V7 FLUFFY, V7 Extra, V7 Mattress, V7 Animal, V7 Car+Boat SV11,968670,229687, etc. Note: ONLY FOR V7, NOT FOR V6, V8, V10, V11 Replacement Part#: V7968670, 02968670, 03225403, 229687, 968670, 06968670, 02968670-03 Compatible with Dyson battery charger:205720-02,64506-07,965875-07,965876-01 Battery Storage Tips: 1.Charge before use. 2.Do not charge the battery immediately after it is exhausted, let the battery cool for 10-20 minutes; this is very important! 3.Store batteries in a dry, clean, cool place, away from heat and metal objects. 4.Use the battery regularly: the battery life will decrease with the use time, so please keep the battery in good condition! 5.For safe transportation, the battery is usually not fully charged, and the battery can only reach the best condition after three cycles (full charge and full discharge three times). 6.Please make sure that the product you want to buy matches the brand, model and part number. After-Sales Support: Before installation, we recommend verifying compatibility with your specific V7 model.If you encounter any questions during use, our engineering team is available to provide prompt assistance—simply reach out for expert guidance to resolve issues quickly. Q: How do I know what model my vacuum is? A: Model location. Like upright vacuums, your model number can be found behind the transparent dust bin. You can also see your model number if you look at the bottom of the machine. You can also find the model number under the handle of an upright vacuum.
